text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're always so cheerful and bubbly.
I wish I could take a leaf from your book.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
All I did was say hello, and you're already
shook? My rizz is off the charts today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: By the way, what does "wahey" mean?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It just, like, comes out naturally when you're
hyped. You know, when the vibes are lit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hyped? …Lit? I don't fully understand,
but I think I get the gist. It's akin to a
friendly greeting.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Slay, Ardan! It sounds so bougie
when you say it! It's giving party princess!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you liked it. Hehe! "Wahey" is a
wonderful word, isn't it?
